refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to generate a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify the key elements of the worksite mapping: terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are critical for planning and execution.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data from site surveys and sensor inputs; validate completeness and accuracy of terrain, obstacle, and work-zone features.
sub_frs: FR1: Identify and characterize terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and map obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and operational areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use multi-sensor data fusion combining LIDAR, camera, and GPS data to generate terrain and obstacle maps.
DP2: Implement real-time obstacle detection algorithms with dynamic updating of the work-zone model.
DP3: Utilize GIS-based mapping software to represent and manage work-zone boundaries.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use multi-sensor data fusion combining LIDAR, camera, and GPS data to generate terrain and obstacle maps.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates terrain and obstacle mapping but requires integration with work-zone representation; coupling is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of sensor data (LIDAR, camera, GPS).
Risk of sensor data inconsistency or loss impacting model accuracy.
High safety criticality demands robust error handling and validation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 and DP3 in subsequent decomposition levels to address dynamic updates and boundary management explicitly.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite mapping and model generation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera, GPS) for terrain and obstacle analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite model/map to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and external systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module owns the worksite mapping function; low diffusion indicating minimal duplication.
Limited containment; vehicle may provide raw sensor data but does not perform mapping.
Minimal containment; teleoperation uses mapping data but does not generate it.
May consume mapping data for safety alerts but does not generate or own mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports high safety criticality by consolidating data processing and model generation.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex or monolithic.
Risk of interface overload with multiple data inputs and outputs.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider modularizing mapping functions within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor data fusion approach.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment is strong with NGHE Solution owning the mapping function; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data and sensor inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for future decomposition of work-zone boundary representation and dynamic updates.
Ensure robust interface management to handle data flows.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement is needed to explicitly address dynamic updates and work-zone boundary management in the FR and DP layers.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Identify and characterize terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and map obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and operational areas.

revise.why: To explicitly capture dynamic updating and boundary representation aspects for completeness and clarity.

assumptions: NGHE Solution module can handle data fusion and model generation.
open_risks: Sensor data inconsistencies impacting model accuracy.
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Validation data comparing generated models to ground truth.
Performance metrics of sensor data fusion algorithms.
